creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Closing since the man page seems to have this information. It looks it's been there since 2008. Please reopen if I'm missing something.

From man rc.conf

     ppp_⟨profile⟩_unit
                 (int) Set the unit number to be used for this profile.  See
                 the manual description of -unitN for details.
